questionHtml: Hence, or otherwise, state the condition on k ∈ R such that all roots of the equation P ( z ) = k are real.
markschemeHtml:
from graph, 19.7 ≤ k  ≤ 26.9       A1A1

Note: Award A1 for correct endpoints and A1 for correct inequalities.

[2 marks]
